title: Staff Engineer, Offensive Security
score_reason: Strong match: Offensive security role requiring 7-10 years experience in penetration testing, vulnerability exploitation, and AppSec. Aligns well with candidate's red team operations, penetration testing, and vulnerability assessment skills. However, requires more experience (7-10 years vs candidate's 4 years) and is a senior/staff level position.

title: Solution Consultant
score_reason: Moderate match: Cybersecurity company (Trellix) with Android reverse engineering focus. Relates to security analysis but is more consultative/sales-oriented rather than hands-on penetration testing. Good benefits package and remote option align with preferences.
